response.overview: A new look of the short film. Jeremy and Tom Fidgerald are two conspiracy-minded cousins ​​and beekeepers who believe the company they work for is a front for aliens who are exploiting Earth's resources. Jeremy and his cousin take action on climate change, kidnapping the company's CEO to force her to admit she's an alien and establish contact with their mothership.
response.title: Asteria: Corte del director
